name: House Mal Remnant Claimants
summary: Residual Mal-aligned claimants who preserve debt, title, or memory claims after the Union successor transition.
motive: Recover lost standing, settle old obligations in their favor, or resist total absorption into the Union order.
power_relations: Subordinate to the Union successor order but capable of nuisance pressure through paperwork and legacy ties
visible_membership_base: Claimant nobles, debt advocates, displaced retainers, record pursuers.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: Their residual legitimacy is strongest where records are messy and people still resent the Union settlement.
